stages.purpose: prove core owner paths: tools, permission, provider routing, agent lifecycle, MCP/skill registry, context, evidence
stages.acceptanceStandard: all core functions pass without duplicate runtime, shortcut bridge, or hidden compatibility path

stages.purpose: prove UI/TUI/operator-visible state can show trustworthy long-task progress and continuation state
commands: browser UI smoke: open local DSXU surface only after release gate permits interactive verification
stages.acceptanceStandard: operator can see pending permission, active plan, tool state, recovery status, cost/evidence without misleading completion

stages.purpose: prove long-running coding tasks survive failure, resume, replay, and parent/agent synthesis
stages.acceptanceStandard: failure paths preserve context and evidence, then resume through the original owner instead of a side runtime

stages.purpose: prove routing, cache, cost, and long-task loops are fast enough under DeepSeek Flash/Flash-MAX/Pro policy
stages.acceptanceStandard: latency/cost evidence is captured and non-DeepSeek fallback remains explicit opt-in only

stages.purpose: prove V18/V19/V20 senior-programmer experience against real paired target evidence, not templates
stages.acceptanceStandard: P12 target raw paired logs meet 14/14 family coverage and delta report supports the 90+ experience claim

stages.purpose: prove source, release surface, pending deletion review, ACL residues, and clean export gate are closed
stages.acceptanceStandard: final preflight passes, no unresolved deletion/ACL/P12 gate remains, then clean export can be created

nextAction: run release closure tests, final preflight, and clean export preflight; do not create export until preflight passes
rule: This test plan defines the final proof order only. It does not run final tests, create export artifacts, stage, commit, delete, reset, or clean.
